items: Web app is online, feel free to try it out and provide feedback!
Added fringe correction option (Auto / Off / Always) for CO3 fitting
Added changelog panel to web interface
Residual plot title changed from 'Residuals - SS(E)' to 'Fit - Data'
Three CO3 fitting models: (A) lstsq, (B) lstsq with shifted CO2 doublet peak position, (C) PCA+Shifted position
Three thickness modes: (A) Manual fringes, (B) Direct value input, (C) Auto reflectance
